content.speakerText: Hi there! You're here for registration, right?
expectedAnswers: Yeah, I'm a new student. I'm Alex.
Yes, I am. My name is Alex Chen from China.
Yep, I just arrived for orientation.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确回应了是否来报到
语言准确性：语法正确，无严重错误
表达自然度：使用了口语化表达如 'Yeah' 或 'Yep'，符合新生身份
关键词覆盖：包含 'new student' 或 'registration' 相关词

content.speakerText: Great! Can I get your student ID or application number?
content.speakerTextCn: 太好了，能给我你的学号或申请号吗？
expectedAnswers: Let me check my email — here it is: S2024-8876.
I have it on my acceptance letter — it's S2024-8876.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：准确提供了所需编号或说明了查找方式
语言准确性：使用了正确动词搭配如 'it's', 'I have it on'
表达自然度：语气礼貌，有适当停顿词如 'Let me check'
关键词覆盖：包含 'student ID' 或 'application number' 相关词

content.speakerText: Welcome to campus! How are you finding everything so far?
content.speakerTextCn: 欢迎来到校园！到目前为止你感觉怎么样？
expectedAnswers: It's a bit overwhelming, but exciting! I'm still getting used to it.
Everything looks great so far. I'm happy to be here.
I'm a little lost, but the staff has been really helpful.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：真实回应了关于适应情况的问题
语言准确性：使用了恰当的时态和连接词（but, so far）
表达自然度：语气真诚，有情感表达（overwhelming, excited, lost）
关键词覆盖：包含 'campus', 'getting used to', 'helpful' 等场景关键词
